treatment_principle.en: Augment qi and fortify the Spleen

composition.explanation_zh: 大补元气，健脾养胃，为君药
composition.explanation_en: Greatly tonifies original qi, fortifies the Spleen and nourishes the Stomach — the sovereign herb.

composition.explanation_zh: 健脾燥湿，加强人参补气健脾之力
composition.explanation_en: Strengthens the Spleen and dries dampness, reinforcing the qi-tonifying action of Ren Shen.

composition.explanation_zh: 健脾渗湿，与白术相配，健脾祛湿之功更强
composition.explanation_en: Strengthens the Spleen and percolates dampness, paired with Bai Zhu for amplified effect.

composition.explanation_zh: 益气和中，调和诸药；用炙甘草
composition.explanation_en: Augments qi, harmonizes the middle, and harmonizes the actions of the other herbs (use honey-fried).

preparation_zh: 水煎服。
preparation_en: Decoct in water and take orally.
description_zh: 脾胃气虚证之代表方，以药性平和、四味皆为君子之品，故名四君子。开补气方剂之先河。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

description_en: Composed of ren shen, bai zhu, fu ling, and zhi gan cao, this is the foundational formula for Spleen-Stomach qi vacuity. Its four mild, tonifying herbs are all 'gentlemanly' in nature (hence the name), and it inaugurated the entire lineage of qi-supplementing formulas in Chinese medicine.

name_en: Tonify the Middle and Augment the Qi Decoction

treatment_principle.en: Tonify the middle and augment qi; raise yang and lift sinking

composition.explanation_zh: 补中益气，升阳固表，为君药
composition.explanation_en: Tonifies the middle, augments qi, raises yang, and secures the exterior — the sovereign herb.
Greatly tonifies original qi, reinforcing Huang Qi.
Fortifies the Spleen and augments qi.
Nourishes the blood and harmonizes the constructive qi.
Regulates qi and harmonizes the Stomach so that tonification does not cause stagnation.
Raises yang and lifts what has fallen.

composition.explanation_zh: 升阳举陷，与升麻相伍助黄芪升举清阳
composition.explanation_en: Raises yang and lifts what has fallen; paired with Sheng Ma to assist Huang Qi in lifting the clear yang.
Harmonizes all the herbs; honey-fried form is used here.

preparation_zh: 水煎服。
preparation_en: Decoct in water and take orally.
description_zh: 李东垣脾胃论代表方。在四君子汤基础上增黄芪、升麻、柴胡、当归、陈皮而成。治疗脾气虚弱、清阳下陷诸证。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

description_en: Li Dongyuan's signature formula from the Pi Wei Lun, built upon Si Jun Zi Tang with the addition of huang qi, sheng ma, chai hu, dang gui, and chen pi. It tonifies the middle and augments qi while raising sunken yang, treating Spleen-qi vacuity with sinking of the clear yang manifesting as chronic diarrhea, rectal prolapse, uterine prolapse, or persistent low-grade fever.

treatment_principle.en: Tonify and regulate the blood

composition.explanation_zh: 补血活血，调经止痛，为君药
composition.explanation_en: Nourishes and invigorates the blood, regulates menstruation, and relieves pain — the sovereign herb.

composition.explanation_zh: 滋阴养血，为补血之要药
composition.explanation_en: Enriches yin and nourishes blood — the chief herb for blood tonification.
Nourishes blood and astringes yin.
Invigorates blood and moves qi, so that qi and blood flow freely together.

preparation_zh: 水煎服。
preparation_en: Decoct in water and take orally.
description_zh: 补血之基本方，妇科调经之祖方。四味为补血养血之要药。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

description_en: The foundational blood-supplementing formula composed of shu di huang, dang gui, bai shao, and chuan xiong. It is the ancestral formula for gynecological menstrual regulation, tonifying and invigorating blood simultaneously. All four herbs are cardinal blood-level medicinals.

treatment_principle.en: Release the muscle layer and harmonize ying and wei

composition.explanation_en: Pungent and warm, unblocks yang and releases the muscles to effect diaphoresis.

composition.explanation_zh: 酸寒敛阴，与桂枝一散一收，调和营卫
composition.explanation_en: Sour and cool, astringes yin — paired with Gui Zhi in a dispersing-and-astringing balance that harmonizes the constructive and defensive qi.

composition.explanation_zh: 辛温助桂枝发散风寒，温胃止呕
composition.explanation_en: Pungent and warm, assists Gui Zhi in dispersing wind-cold and warms the Stomach to stop vomiting.

composition.explanation_zh: 甘温益气补中，与生姜相伍调和营卫
composition.explanation_en: Sweet and warm, augments qi and tonifies the middle; paired with Sheng Jiang to harmonize the constructive and defensive qi.
Augments qi and harmonizes the middle.

preparation_zh: 水煎服。服后啜热稀粥一升余，以助药力，温覆取微汗。
preparation_en: Decoct in water and take orally. After taking, sip over one sheng of hot thin rice porridge to boost the medicinal effect, then cover warmly to promote a mild sweat.
description_zh: 伤寒论第一方。桂枝配白芍为调和营卫的经典药对。开后世和法之先河。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

description_en: The first formula of the Shang Han Lun, composed of gui zhi, bai shao, zhi gan cao, sheng jiang, and da zao. The gui zhi and bai shao pairing to harmonize constructive and defensive qi is the archetypal medicinal couple, and the formula inaugurated the harmonizing therapeutic method for subsequent generations.

treatment_principle.en: Induce sweating to release the exterior; diffuse the Lung and calm wheezing

composition.explanation_en: Induces sweating to release the exterior, diffuses the Lung, and calms wheezing.
Warms and unblocks the channels, assisting Ma Huang in effecting diaphoresis.

composition.explanation_zh: 降利肺气，与麻黄相配宣降相因
composition.explanation_en: Descends Lung qi; paired with Ma Huang in a diffusion-and-descent balance.
Harmonizes all the herbs; honey-fried form is used here.

preparation_zh: 水煎服。覆取微似汗，不须啜粥。
preparation_en: Decoct in water and take orally. Cover warmly to promote a very mild sweat; porridge is not needed.
description_zh: 治外感风寒表实证之代表方。与桂枝汤为伤寒论太阳病表实表虚证之对照方。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

description_en: The representative formula for exterior repletion due to wind-cold, composed of ma huang, gui zhi, xing ren, and zhi gan cao. It pairs with Gui Zhi Tang as the contrasting formulas for greater yang exterior repletion versus exterior vacuity in the Shang Han Lun.

treatment_principle.en: Harmonize the Shaoyang

composition.explanation_en: Harmonizes the Shaoyang and soothes the Liver to resolve depression.

composition.explanation_zh: 清泄少阳之热，与柴胡一升一降
composition.explanation_en: Clears and drains Shaoyang heat; paired with Chai Hu in an upward-and-downward action.
Supports the upright qi in expelling the pathogen.
Harmonizes the Stomach, descends counterflow, and stops vomiting.

composition.explanation_zh: 助半夏和胃止呕，并散表邪
composition.explanation_en: Assists Ban Xia in harmonizing the Stomach and stopping vomiting, and disperses exterior pathogens.

composition.explanation_zh: 与生姜调和营卫，益气和中
composition.explanation_en: Paired with Sheng Jiang to harmonize the constructive and defensive qi and augment qi in the middle.
Harmonizes all the herbs.

preparation_zh: 水煎服。
preparation_en: Decoct in water and take orally.
description_zh: 少阳病主方。原方含柴胡、黄芩、人参、半夏、生姜、大枣、炙甘草七味；此处简记主要药味。具有最丰富的加减法。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

description_en: The principal formula for lesser yang (shao yang) disease from the Shang Han Lun, containing chai hu, huang qin, ren shen, ban xia, sheng jiang, da zao, and zhi gan cao. It harmonizes the exterior and interior, possessing the richest set of modification rules (jia jian fa) of any classical formula.

treatment_principle.en: Course the Liver and resolve depression; nourish blood and fortify the Spleen

composition.explanation_en: Soothes the Liver and resolves depression.
Nourishes and harmonizes the blood.
Nourishes blood and softens the Liver.
Fortifies the Spleen and dries dampness.
Fortifies the Spleen and percolates dampness.
Harmonizes all the herbs.
Warms the Stomach and harmonizes the middle, assisting in dispersing constraint.
Disperses constrained heat and assists Chai Hu in soothing the Liver.

preparation_zh: 原方为散剂；现多作汤剂水煎服。
preparation_en: Originally a powder formula; nowadays mostly prepared as a decoction in water for oral use.
description_zh: 肝郁血虚脾弱之代表方。临床应用极广，被誉为妇科调经之圣方。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

description_en: The representative formula for Liver constraint with blood vacuity and Spleen weakness, composed of chai hu, dang gui, bai shao, bai zhu, fu ling, zhi gan cao, sheng jiang, and bo he. Widely applied across clinical specialties, it is acclaimed as the sage formula for gynecological menstrual regulation, coursing the Liver and fortifying the Spleen while nourishing blood.

treatment_principle.en: Restore yang and rescue from collapse

composition.explanation_zh: 大辛大热，回阳救逆；先煎
composition.explanation_en: Extremely pungent and hot, restores yang and rescues from counterflow; decocted first.

composition.explanation_zh: 温中散寒，与附子相须为用，回阳救逆之力倍增
composition.explanation_en: Warms the middle and dispels cold; used in mutual necessity with Fu Zi to double the power of restoring yang and rescuing from counterflow.

composition.explanation_zh: 益气固脱，并制附子之毒
composition.explanation_en: Augments qi to consolidate collapse and moderates the toxicity of Fu Zi.

preparation_zh: 附子先煎0.5–1小时，再入余药水煎服。
preparation_en: Decoct fu zi first for 0.5-1 hour, then add the remaining herbs and decoct in water for oral use.
description_zh: 亡阳虚脱之急救方。原方含附子、干姜、炙甘草三味；此处简记主要药味。与少阴病四逆散名同药异，须严格区别。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

description_en: The emergency formula for yang collapse and devastation from the Shang Han Lun, composed of fu zi, gan jiang, and zhi gan cao. It restores yang and rescues from desertion. It must be strictly distinguished from Si Ni San (which shares only the name but contains entirely different herbs) used for yang constraint patterns.

treatment_principle.en: Dry dampness, transform phlegm, regulate qi and harmonize the middle

composition.explanation_zh: 燥湿化痰，降逆止呕，为君药
composition.explanation_en: Dries dampness, transforms phlegm, descends counterflow, and stops vomiting — the sovereign herb.

composition.explanation_zh: 理气燥湿，与半夏相须为用
composition.explanation_en: Regulates qi and dries dampness; used in mutual necessity with Ban Xia.

composition.explanation_zh: 健脾渗湿，使湿无所聚则痰无由生
composition.explanation_en: Fortifies the Spleen and percolates dampness so that dampness does not gather and phlegm has no source.
Harmonizes all the herbs, moistens the Lung, and harmonizes the middle.

preparation_zh: 水煎服。原方加生姜七片、乌梅一枚同煎。
preparation_en: Decoct in water and take orally. The original formula adds seven slices of fresh ginger and one wu mei, decocted together.
description_zh: 燥湿化痰之基础方。陈皮、半夏二药以陈久者良，故名二陈。后世化痰诸方多由此化裁。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

description_en: The foundational formula for drying dampness and transforming phlegm, composed of ban xia, chen pi, fu ling, and zhi gan cao. Named for ban xia and chen pi being superior when aged (chen), it established the template from which the majority of subsequent phlegm-transforming formulas were derived.

name_en: Four-Substance Decoction with Safflower and Peach Kernel

treatment_principle.en: Nourish and invigorate blood, expel stasis and unblock menses

composition.explanation_en: Enriches yin and nourishes blood.
Nourishes and invigorates the blood, regulates menstruation, and relieves pain.
Nourishes blood and astringes yin.
Invigorates blood and moves qi.
Invigorates blood and dispels stasis.

composition.explanation_zh: 活血通经，与桃仁相须为用
composition.explanation_en: Invigorates blood and frees the channels; used in mutual necessity with Tao Ren.

preparation_zh: 水煎服。
preparation_en: Decoct in water and take orally.
description_zh: 在四物汤基础上加桃仁、红花而成，养血与活血并重。妇科调经活血之常用方。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

description_en: An augmentation of Si Wu Tang with the addition of tao ren and hong hua, balancing blood nourishment with blood invigoration. It is a widely used gynecological formula for menstrual regulation and blood-stasis transformation.

treatment_principle.en: Clear heat and generate fluids

composition.explanation_zh: 辛甘大寒，清泄气分大热
composition.explanation_en: Pungent, sweet, and extremely cold — clears and drains major heat at the qi level.
Bitter, cold, and moist — clears heat and enriches yin.

composition.explanation_zh: 甘平益胃生津，护胃气、防石膏知母之大寒伤中，并助化生津液
composition.explanation_en: Sweet and neutral; augments the Stomach and engenders fluids, protecting Stomach qi from the strong cold of Shi Gao and Zhi Mu while generating fluids.
Harmonizes all the herbs, augments the Stomach, and protects the fluids.

preparation_zh: 原方加粳米；现常省略。水煎服。
preparation_en: The original formula includes geng mi (rice); this is often omitted nowadays. Decoct in water and take orally.
description_zh: 治阳明气分大热之代表方。原方四味（石膏、知母、甘草、粳米），此处简记主要药味。临床见四大症（大热、大渴、大汗、脉洪大）即可用之。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

description_en: The representative formula for yang-brightness qi-level great heat from the Shang Han Lun, composed of shi gao, zhi mu, zhi gan cao, and geng mi. When the four cardinal signs appear—great heat, great thirst, great sweating, and surging pulse—this formula is indicated.

treatment_principle.en: Enrich and tonify the Liver and Kidney

composition.explanation_zh: 滋阴补肾，填精益髓，为君药
composition.explanation_en: Enriches yin and supplements the Kidney, filling essence and augmenting marrow — the sovereign herb.
Nourishes the Liver and Kidney and also astringes essence.
Supplements Spleen yin and also secures the Kidney.

composition.explanation_zh: 利湿泄浊，并制熟地之滋腻
composition.explanation_en: Drains dampness and expels turbidity, tempering the richness of Shu Di Huang.

composition.explanation_zh: 清泄肝火，制山茱萸之温
composition.explanation_en: Clears and drains Liver fire, tempering the warmth of Shan Zhu Yu.

composition.explanation_zh: 淡渗脾湿，助山药之健运
composition.explanation_en: Gently percolates Spleen dampness and assists Shan Yao in fortifying Spleen movement.

preparation_zh: 原为蜜丸；现亦作汤剂或浓缩丸服用。
preparation_en: Originally prepared as honey pills; also administered as a decoction or concentrated pills in modern practice.
description_zh: 钱乙创制于《小儿药证直诀》，为滋补肝肾阴虚之代表方。三补三泻，配伍精当，开创了滋补肝肾方剂之范式。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

description_en: Created by Qian Yi in Xiao Er Yao Zheng Zhi Jue, this is the representative formula for Liver-Kidney yin vacuity. Composed of shu di huang, shan zhu yu, shan yao (three supplementing herbs) and ze xie, mu dan pi, fu ling (three draining herbs), its meticulously balanced 'three supplements and three drains' configuration established the paradigm for all subsequent Liver-Kidney yin-nourishing formulas.

treatment_principle.en: Drastically purge heat accumulation

composition.explanation_zh: 苦寒泻下，荡涤肠胃实热积滞
composition.explanation_en: Bitter-cold purgative action that sweeps out heat accumulation from the Stomach and intestines.

composition.explanation_zh: 咸寒润燥软坚，与大黄相须为用
composition.explanation_en: Salty and cold — moistens dryness and softens hardness; used in mutual necessity with Da Huang.
Descends qi and eliminates fullness.
Breaks qi and dissipates glomus.

preparation_zh: 先煎厚朴、枳实；次入大黄；后下芒硝。
preparation_en: Decoct hou po and zhi shi first; then add da huang; add mang xiao near the end.
description_zh: 阳明腑实证之代表方。痞、满、燥、实四症俱全者用之。峻下之剂，中病即止，不可久服。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

description_en: The representative formula for yang-brightness bowel repletion from the Shang Han Lun, composed of da huang, mang xiao, zhi shi, and hou po. Indicated when all four signs—glomus, fullness, dryness, and repletion—are present. A drastic purgative that should be stopped once the condition resolves and never taken long-term.

name_en: Tangkuei Decoction to Tonify the Blood

treatment_principle.en: Tonify qi to generate blood

composition.explanation_zh: 重用以大补脾肺之气，旺气以生血
composition.explanation_en: Used in large dose to greatly tonify Spleen and Lung qi so that abundant qi generates blood.

composition.explanation_zh: 养血和营，与黄芪相伍气血双补
composition.explanation_en: Nourishes blood and harmonizes the constructive qi; paired with Huang Qi to tonify both qi and blood.

preparation_zh: 水煎服。
preparation_en: Decoct in water and take orally.
description_zh: 李东垣方。本方仅二味药，黄芪与当归之比为五比一。所谓「有形之血不能速生，无形之气所当急固」——通过大补脾肺之气来推动血液生成。气血相生之经典方。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

description_en: Li Dongyuan's two-herb formula with huang qi and dang gui in a 5:1 ratio. Based on the principle that 'formless qi must be urgently secured since formed blood cannot be rapidly generated,' it vigorously supplements Spleen-Lung qi to drive blood production. A classic demonstration of the mutual generation of qi and blood.

treatment_principle.en: Augment qi and tonify blood

composition.explanation_en: Greatly tonifies the original qi.
Enriches yin and nourishes blood.
Fortifies the Spleen and dries dampness.
Fortifies the Spleen and percolates dampness.
Nourishes and invigorates the blood.
Nourishes blood and astringes yin.
Invigorates blood and moves qi.
Harmonizes all the herbs.

preparation_zh: 水煎服。
preparation_en: Decoct in water and take orally.
description_zh: 由四君子汤合四物汤而成，气血双补之代表方。八味药皆补益之珍品，故名八珍。临床凡气血俱虚之证皆可用之。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

description_en: The combination of Si Jun Zi Tang and Si Wu Tang into a single formula for simultaneous qi and blood supplementation. All eight herbs are precious tonics (hence 'Eight Treasures'), and the formula is indicated for any pattern of concurrent qi and blood vacuity.

source_chapter: 金匮要略 · 妇人杂病脉证并治

treatment_principle.en: Move qi and dissipate nodulation; descend rebellion and transform phlegm

composition.explanation_en: Transforms phlegm, dissipates binding, descends counterflow, and harmonizes the Stomach.
Descends qi and eliminates fullness.
Percolates dampness and fortifies the Spleen so that dampness has no place to gather.

composition.explanation_zh: 和胃止呕，并制半夏之毒
composition.explanation_en: Harmonizes the Stomach and stops vomiting; also moderates the toxicity of Ban Xia.
Aromatic dispersion — unblocks and frees constrained qi.

preparation_zh: 水煎服。
preparation_en: Decoct in water and take orally.
description_zh: 出自《金匮要略》（与《伤寒论》同为张仲景作品，此处归于伤寒论条目下）。治疗梅核气——咽中如有炙脔——之代表方。情志不遂、气郁痰凝之证。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

description_en: From the Jin Gui Yao Lue, this formula treats plum-pit qi (mei he qi)—the sensation of something stuck in the throat that can neither be swallowed nor expelled. Composed of ban xia, hou po, fu ling, sheng jiang, and zi su ye, it addresses qi constraint with phlegm congelation from emotional frustration.

treatment_principle.en: Augment qi, stabilize the exterior, and stop sweating

composition.explanation_zh: 补益脾肺之气，固表止汗
composition.explanation_en: Tonifies Spleen and Lung qi and secures the exterior to stop sweating.
Fortifies the Spleen and augments qi, assisting Huang Qi in securing the exterior.

composition.explanation_zh: 走表祛风，与黄芪相配，散中有收，不致留邪
composition.explanation_en: Circulates the exterior and dispels wind; paired with Huang Qi in a dispersing-and-astringing balance that does not retain the pathogen.

preparation_zh: 原方为散剂，每服9g。现亦作汤剂水煎服。
preparation_en: Originally a powder formula, 9g per dose. Also prepared as a decoction in water for oral use in modern practice.
description_zh: 治疗表虚自汗及易感外邪之代表方。黄芪与防风相配，一固表一散表，看似矛盾实为绝妙——固表而不留邪，祛邪而不伤正。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

description_en: The representative formula for exterior vacuity spontaneous sweating and susceptibility to external pathogens, composed of huang qi, bai zhu, and fang feng. The pairing of huang qi (which secures the exterior) with fang feng (which disperses the exterior) seems contradictory yet is masterful: it secures without trapping pathogens and dispels without damaging the upright.

treatment_principle.en: Dry dampness and transport in the Spleen; move qi and harmonize the Stomach

composition.explanation_en: Bitter and warm — dries dampness and fortifies Spleen movement in the middle.
Moves qi and eliminates fullness, assisting Cang Zhu in transforming dampness.
Regulates qi and transforms dampness, awakens the Spleen, and harmonizes the Stomach.
Harmonizes all the herbs.

preparation_zh: 原方为散剂；现作汤剂水煎服，常加生姜、大枣。
preparation_en: Originally a powder formula; now prepared as a decoction in water for oral use, often with fresh ginger and da zao added.
description_zh: 燥湿和胃之基础方。湿困脾阳，脘痞食少者用之。后世许多燥湿方剂皆以此为底，如不换金正气散、藿香正气散等。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

description_en: The foundational formula for drying dampness and harmonizing the Stomach, composed of cang zhu, hou po, chen pi, and zhi gan cao. Indicated for dampness encumbering the Spleen yang with epigastric glomus and poor appetite. Many subsequent dampness-drying formulas are derived from this base, including Bu Huan Jin Zheng Qi San and Huo Xiang Zheng Qi San.

treatment_principle.en: Acrid-cool release of the exterior; clear heat and resolve toxin

composition.explanation_zh: 辛凉透表，清热解毒，与连翘相须为用，共为君药
composition.explanation_en: Acrid, cool — releases the exterior and clears heat and toxin; paired with Lian Qiao as co-sovereign.

composition.explanation_zh: 清热解毒，透表散邪，与金银花共为君
composition.explanation_en: Clears heat, resolves toxin and releases the exterior — co-sovereign with Jin Yin Hua.

composition.explanation_zh: 辛凉疏风，清利头目，透发表邪
composition.explanation_en: Acrid, cool — disperses wind, clears head and eyes, and vents the exterior pathogen.
Disperses wind-heat, resolves toxin and benefits the throat.

composition.explanation_zh: 性虽微温而透表力强，助君臣透邪外出，于辛凉方中反佐以增透散之功
composition.explanation_en: Although slightly warm, strongly vents the exterior — a corrective assistant in this cool formula to enhance dispersal.

composition.explanation_zh: 辛凉解表，宣散表邪，与荆芥协同透邪外出
composition.explanation_en: Acrid and cool; releases the exterior and vents pathogen, cooperating with Jing Jie to expel the evil outward.

composition.explanation_zh: 甘淡渗利，清心除烦，使邪热从小便而出
composition.explanation_en: Sweet and bland; clears Heart heat, eliminates vexation, and draws heat out through the urine.
Diffuses Lung qi, benefits the throat and carries the other herbs upward.
Clears heat, engenders fluids and alleviates thirst and vexation.
Clears heat, resolves toxin and harmonizes the other herbs.

preparation_zh: 上杵为散，每服六钱，鲜苇根汤煎，香气大出，即取服，勿过煎。现代多作汤剂水煎服。
preparation_en: Pound into powder; take six qian per dose, decocted with fresh reed root broth; take once the aroma is fully released — do not over-decoct. In modern practice, mostly prepared as a decoction.

modifications.condition: 传统原方另含淡竹叶与淡豆豉
modifications.rationale: 临床可加入以全吴鞠通原义

description_zh: 吴鞠通《温病条辨》上焦篇所载辛凉平剂，为治温病初起、邪在卫分之代表方。证见发热微恶风寒、无汗或有汗不畅、头痛口渴、咳嗽咽痛、舌尖红、苔薄白或薄黄、脉浮数。以轻清宣透为法，使表邪外达而热毒内清。

rhyme.text_zh: 银翘散主上焦疴，竹叶荆牛豉薄荷。甘桔芦根凉解法，清疏风热煮无过。
rhyme.gloss_en: Yin Qiao San governs upper-burner ailments — with Zhu Ye, Jing Jie, Niu Bang Zi, Dou Chi and Bo He; Gan Cao, Jie Geng and Lu Gen give a cooling release; clear and disperse wind-heat without over-decocting.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

description_en: Wu Jutong's acrid-cool balanced formula from the upper-burner chapter of Wen Bing Tiao Bian, the representative formula for warm disease at the initial defensive (wei) level. With jin yin hua and lian qiao as chief herbs, it uses a light, clearing, and venting method to release exterior pathogens and clear interior heat-toxin for fever, slight aversion to wind-cold, sore throat, and a floating rapid pulse.

treatment_principle.en: Disperse wind and clear heat; diffuse the Lung and stop cough

composition.explanation_zh: 甘苦而凉，轻清疏散，清透肺络之热，为君药
composition.explanation_en: Sweet-bitter and cool — lightly disperses wind and clears heat from the Lung collaterals; sovereign herb.

composition.explanation_zh: 疏散风热，清利头目，与桑叶相须
composition.explanation_en: Disperses wind-heat and clears the head and eyes — paired with Sang Ye as co-sovereign.
Bitter, descending — regulates Lung qi and stops cough.

composition.explanation_zh: 宣肺利咽，与杏仁一升一降，调畅肺气
composition.explanation_en: Diffuses Lung qi and benefits the throat; paired with Xing Ren to regulate Lung qi by raising and descending.

composition.explanation_zh: 透邪解毒，助君药清透风热
composition.explanation_en: Vents pathogens and resolves toxin, assisting the sovereign herbs in clearing wind-heat.
Acrid-cool — vents the exterior and assists dispersal of wind-heat.
Clears heat, engenders fluids and allays thirst.
Harmonizes the other herbs; with Jie Geng benefits the throat.

preparation_zh: 水二杯，煮取一杯，日二服。现代多作汤剂水煎服，不宜久煎。
preparation_en: Boil two cups of water down to one cup; take twice daily. In modern practice, mostly prepared as a decoction — do not decoct for too long.

modifications.condition: 气分热盛，加重口渴烦躁

description_zh: 吴鞠通《温病条辨》所载辛凉轻剂，为风温初起、邪犯肺卫之咳嗽主方。证见但咳、身热不甚、口微渴、脉浮数。较银翘散发汗之力稍逊而宣肺止咳之功更专，故以治咳为主。

rhyme.text_zh: 桑菊饮中桔杏翘，芦根甘草薄荷饶。清疏肺卫轻宣剂，风温咳嗽服之消。
rhyme.gloss_en: Sang Ju Yin contains Jie Geng, Xing Ren and Lian Qiao; Lu Gen, Gan Cao and Bo He round it out — a light diffusing prescription that clears Lung-defense and relieves warm-febrile cough.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

description_en: Wu Jutong's acrid-cool light formula from Wen Bing Tiao Bian for early wind-warmth with Lung-defensive cough as the predominant symptom. Lighter in diaphoretic action than Yin Qiao San but more specialized in diffusing the Lung and stopping cough, it uses sang ye and ju hua as chief herbs for the presentation of cough with mild fever, slight thirst, and a floating rapid pulse.

source_chapter: 辨太阳病脉证并治中 第40条

treatment_principle.en: Release the exterior and dissipate cold; warm the Lung and transform thin mucus

composition.explanation_zh: 发汗解表，宣肺平喘，为君药
composition.explanation_en: Induces sweating to release the exterior, diffuses Lung qi and calms wheezing — sovereign herb.

composition.explanation_zh: 发汗解肌，温通经脉，助麻黄解表散寒
composition.explanation_en: Releases the muscle layer and warms the channels, assisting Ma Huang in dispersing wind-cold — co-sovereign.

composition.explanation_zh: 温肺化饮，与细辛同为治内停寒饮之要药
composition.explanation_en: Warms the Lung and transforms thin mucus — an essential herb with Xi Xin for cold-rheum retention.

composition.explanation_zh: 温肺散寒，助干姜温化痰饮
composition.explanation_en: Warms the Lung and dissipates cold, assisting Gan Jiang in transforming thin mucus.

composition.explanation_zh: 养血敛阴，防辛散太过耗伤阴液
composition.explanation_en: Nourishes blood and restrains yin, preventing excessive dispersal from damaging fluids.

composition.explanation_zh: 敛肺止咳，与干姜、细辛一散一收，散不伤正
composition.explanation_en: Astringes the Lung and stops cough; balances Gan Jiang and Xi Xin so dispersal does not injure right qi.
Dries dampness, transforms phlegm and harmonizes the Stomach by directing qi downward.
Augments qi, harmonizes the middle and harmonizes the other herbs.

preparation_zh: 水煎服。
preparation_en: Decoct in water and take orally.
description_zh: 《伤寒论》治外寒里饮之要方。证见恶寒发热、无汗、咳喘、痰多清稀色白、胸痞干呕、舌苔白滑、脉浮。表里同治，发散与温化并行，散中有收，温而不燥。

rhyme.text_zh: 小青龙汤桂芍麻，干姜辛夏草味加。外束风寒内停饮，散寒蠲饮效堪夸。
rhyme.gloss_en: Xiao Qing Long Tang has Gui Zhi, Bai Shao and Ma Huang; add Gan Jiang, Xi Xin, Ban Xia, Gan Cao and Wu Wei Zi — for exterior wind-cold with inner rheum, its dissipation and drying of thin mucus are greatly praised.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

description_en: The Shang Han Lun formula for exterior cold with interior thin-mucus (wai han nei yin). Composed of ma huang, gui zhi, xi xin, gan jiang, wu wei zi, ban xia, bai shao, and zhi gan cao, it treats both exterior and interior simultaneously—dispersing and warming in concert, with astringent within the dispersing and non-drying warmth.

source_chapter: 辨太阳病脉证并治中 第38条

treatment_principle.en: Induce sweating to release the exterior; concurrently clear interior heat

composition.explanation_zh: 重用发汗解表，宣肺平喘，为君药
composition.explanation_en: Used in large dose to strongly induce sweating, release the exterior and diffuse the Lung — sovereign herb.

composition.explanation_zh: 解肌发表，助麻黄散寒解表
composition.explanation_en: Releases the muscle layer, assisting Ma Huang in dispersing cold from the exterior.

composition.explanation_zh: 降气平喘，助麻黄宣降肺气
composition.explanation_en: Directs qi downward and calms wheezing, balancing Ma Huang's diffusing action on the Lung.

composition.explanation_zh: 辛甘大寒，清泻里热，除烦躁
composition.explanation_en: Acrid, sweet and very cold — clears and drains interior heat and relieves vexed restlessness.

composition.explanation_zh: 助麻桂解表散寒，和胃止呕
composition.explanation_en: Assists Ma Huang and Gui Zhi in releasing the exterior; harmonizes the Stomach.

composition.explanation_zh: 益气养血，与生姜相配调和营卫
composition.explanation_en: Augments qi and nourishes blood; paired with Sheng Jiang to harmonize nutritive and defensive qi.

composition.explanation_zh: 调和诸药，缓麻黄石膏峻烈之性
composition.explanation_en: Harmonizes the other herbs and moderates the harsh nature of Ma Huang and Shi Gao.

preparation_zh: 水煎服。得汗止服，不可过剂；取微汗为度。
preparation_en: 水煎服。得汗止服，不可过剂；取微汗为度。
description_zh: 《伤寒论》治太阳伤寒表实兼里有郁热之主方。证见恶寒发热、身疼痛、不汗出而烦躁、脉浮紧。发表力峻，清里并行，非表实无汗兼烦躁者不可轻用；汗多亡阳者禁用。

rhyme.text_zh: 大青龙汤桂麻黄，杏草石膏姜枣藏。太阳无汗兼烦躁，散寒清热此方良。
rhyme.gloss_en: Da Qing Long Tang has Gui Zhi and Ma Huang; Xing Ren, Gan Cao, Shi Gao, Sheng Jiang and Da Zao are stored within — for taiyang disease without sweat with vexation, this formula is fine for both dissipating cold and clearing heat.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

description_en: The Shang Han Lun formula for greater yang wind-cold exterior repletion complicated by interior constraint heat. Composed of ma huang, gui zhi, xing ren, shi gao, sheng jiang, da zao, and zhi gan cao, its diaphoretic force is drastic and it simultaneously clears interior heat. Strictly contraindicated unless exterior repletion without sweating is accompanied by vexation and agitation.

name_en: Ephedra, Apricot Kernel, Gypsum and Licorice Decoction
source_chapter: 辨太阳病脉证并治中 第63条

treatment_principle.en: Acrid-cool diffusion and drainage; clear the Lung and calm wheezing

composition.explanation_zh: 宣肺平喘，发散外邪，为君药
composition.explanation_en: Diffuses Lung qi, calms wheezing and disperses the residual exterior pathogen — sovereign herb.

composition.explanation_zh: 辛甘大寒，清泄肺热，制约麻黄之温，与麻黄相配辛凉宣泄
composition.explanation_en: Very cold — clears Lung heat and counterbalances Ma Huang's warmth; together they diffuse the Lung in an acrid-cool manner.

composition.explanation_zh: 降气止咳平喘，与麻黄一宣一降
composition.explanation_en: Directs qi downward, stops cough and calms wheezing; balances Ma Huang's diffusing action.
Augments qi, harmonizes the middle and harmonizes the other herbs.

preparation_zh: 水煎服。石膏先煎。
preparation_en: Decoct in water and take orally. Shi gao (gypsum) should be decocted first.
description_zh: 《伤寒论》治外感风邪、邪热壅肺证之主方。证见身热不解、咳逆气急甚则鼻煽、口渴、有汗或无汗、舌红苔薄白或黄、脉浮数。本方由麻黄汤去桂枝、加石膏而成，辛温变辛凉，以清宣肺热为要。

rhyme.text_zh: 仲景麻杏甘石汤，辛凉宣肺清热良。邪热壅肺咳喘急，有汗无汗均能尝。
rhyme.gloss_en: Zhongjing's Ma Xing Gan Shi Tang — acrid-cool, diffuses the Lung, a fine clearer of heat; for pathogenic heat congesting the Lung with urgent cough-wheeze, it serves whether sweating is present or not.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

description_en: The Shang Han Lun formula for external wind-pathogen with heat congesting the Lung. Derived from Ma Huang Tang by removing gui zhi and adding shi gao, it transforms from acrid-warm to acrid-cool. Its core therapeutic principle is to clear and diffuse Lung heat for persistent fever, cough with rapid breathing or nasal flaring, thirst, and a floating rapid pulse.

source_chapter: 辨阳明病脉证并治 第247条

treatment_principle.en: Moisten the intestines and drain heat; move qi and unblock the bowels

composition.explanation_zh: 质润多脂，润肠通便，为君药
composition.explanation_en: Oily and moist — moistens the intestines and unblocks the bowels; sovereign herb.
Directs qi downward and moistens the intestines, assisting Huo Ma Ren in unblocking the bowels.

composition.explanation_zh: 养阴柔肝，与麻仁、杏仁共润燥
composition.explanation_en: Nourishes yin and softens the Liver; together with the seed herbs moistens dryness.
Drains heat and purges accumulation, sweeping the intestines and Stomach.
Breaks up qi stagnation and dissolves accumulation, assisting the purgative action.

composition.explanation_zh: 下气除满，与枳实助大黄推荡积滞
composition.explanation_en: Descends qi and relieves fullness; with Zhi Shi assists Da Huang in driving out accumulation.

preparation_zh: 上六味，蜜和丸如梧桐子大，饮服十丸，日三服；渐加，以知为度。现代亦可作汤剂水煎服。
preparation_en: Combine all six ingredients, form honey pills the size of a wutong seed, take ten pills with a drink, three times daily; gradually increase the dose until a response is felt. In modern practice, may also be prepared as a decoction.

modifications.condition: 津液亏耗甚，大便燥结如羊屎

description_zh: 《伤寒论》治脾约证之主方。证见大便干结、小便频数、苔微黄少津、脉浮涩而数。所谓「脾约」者，胃强脾弱，津液偏渗膀胱而不能还入胃肠，故大便燥结。本方润下与轻下并行，润中有通，下不伤正，为丸缓治，适于虚人肠燥便秘。

rhyme.text_zh: 麻子仁丸治脾约，大黄枳朴杏芍药。土燥津枯便难解，胃强脾弱此方约。
rhyme.gloss_en: Ma Zi Ren Wan treats Spleen-constraint — with Da Huang, Zhi Shi, Hou Po, Xing Ren and Bai Shao; when earth is dry and fluids depleted so the stool is hard, with a strong Stomach and weak Spleen, this formula constrains.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

description_en: The Shang Han Lun formula for Spleen-constraint (pi yue) syndrome, in which a strong Stomach but weak Spleen diverts fluids preferentially to the Bladder, causing frequent urination with dry, bound stool. Composed of huo ma ren, xing ren, bai shao, zhi shi, hou po, and da huang, it combines moistening and mild purgation without injuring the upright, formulated as pills for gradual treatment.

source_chapter: 辨太阳病脉证并治下 第149条

treatment_principle.en: Harmonize cold and heat; dissipate focal distention and resolve clumping

composition.explanation_zh: 辛开散结，降逆止呕，为君药
composition.explanation_en: Acrid — opens and disperses clumping; directs rebellious qi downward and stops vomiting; sovereign herb.

composition.explanation_zh: 辛温散寒，与半夏同辛开
composition.explanation_en: Acrid and warm — dissipates cold; with Ban Xia forms the acrid-opening pair.

composition.explanation_zh: 苦寒清热，与黄连同苦降
composition.explanation_en: Bitter and cold — clears heat; with Huang Lian forms the bitter-descending pair.
Bitter and cold — drains fire and clears damp-heat in the middle jiao.

composition.explanation_zh: 补益中气，扶正以助祛邪
composition.explanation_en: Tonifies central qi, supporting right qi so the pathogen can be dispelled.

composition.explanation_zh: 益气养血，与人参、甘草共补脾胃
composition.explanation_en: Augments qi and nourishes blood; with Ren Shen and Gan Cao tonifies the Spleen and Stomach.

composition.explanation_zh: 甘缓和中，调和诸药；用炙甘草
composition.explanation_en: Sweet and moderating — harmonizes the middle and the other herbs (use honey-fried).

preparation_zh: 水煎，去滓再煎，分温再服。
preparation_en: Decoct in water, strain the dregs, then decoct the strained liquid again; divide into warm doses and take.
description_zh: 《伤寒论》治寒热互结于中焦、脾胃升降失常之痞证主方。证见心下痞满而不痛、呕吐、肠鸣下利、舌苔薄黄而腻、脉弦数。辛开苦降、寒热并用、补泻兼施，为和法调和肠胃之代表方。

rhyme.text_zh: 半夏泻心黄连芩，干姜甘草与人参。大枣和之治虚痞，法在降阳而和阴。
rhyme.gloss_en: Ban Xia Xie Xin has Huang Lian and Huang Qin, plus Gan Jiang, Gan Cao and Ren Shen; Da Zao harmonizes it — it treats vacuity focal distention by descending yang and harmonizing yin.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

description_en: The Shang Han Lun formula for cold-heat complex glomus (pi) of the middle burner with impaired Spleen-Stomach ascending and descending. Composed of ban xia, huang qin, huang lian, gan jiang, ren shen, da zao, and zhi gan cao, it employs acrid-opening and bitter-descending with concurrent cold and warm, supplementing and draining simultaneously. The archetype of the harmonizing method for regulating the gastrointestinal tract.

name_en: Universal Benefit Decoction to Eliminate Toxin
source_chapter: 李东垣《东垣试效方》(传统归属，亦载于《卫生宝鉴》)

treatment_principle.en: Clear heat and resolve toxin; disperse wind and scatter the pathogen

composition.explanation_zh: 酒炒，清上焦热毒，为君药
composition.explanation_en: Wine-fried — clears heat and toxin in the upper jiao; sovereign herb.

composition.explanation_zh: 酒炒，清心胃之火，与黄芩相须
composition.explanation_en: Wine-fried — clears Heart and Stomach fire; paired with Huang Qin as co-sovereign.
Disperses wind-heat, resolves toxin and benefits the throat.
Clears heat, resolves toxin and reduces swelling by resolving clumping.

composition.explanation_zh: 辛凉疏风，清利头目咽喉
composition.explanation_en: Acrid-cool — disperses wind and clears the head, eyes and throat.
Disperses wind-heat and transforms phlegm to resolve clumping.

composition.explanation_zh: 清热凉血解毒，滋阴降火
composition.explanation_en: Clears heat, cools blood and resolves toxin; nourishes yin and descends fire.
Clears heat, resolves toxin, cools blood and benefits the throat.
Diffuses the Lung, benefits the throat and carries the other herbs upward.
Regulates qi and disperses congestion, preventing stasis from the bitter-cold herbs.

composition.explanation_zh: 疏散少阳之邪，引药上行头面
composition.explanation_en: Disperses Shaoyang pathogens and guides the formula upward to the head and face.

composition.explanation_zh: 升阳解毒，与柴胡同引药上行，兼散头面风热
composition.explanation_en: Raises yang and resolves toxin; with Chai Hu guides the formula upward and disperses wind-heat in the head and face.
Clears heat, resolves toxin and harmonizes the other herbs.

preparation_zh: 上为细末，汤调，时时服之；或蜜拌为丸噙化。现代多作汤剂水煎服。
preparation_en: Grind into fine powder, mix with hot water, and take frequently; or blend with honey to form pills to be dissolved slowly in the mouth. In modern practice, mostly prepared as a decoction.

modifications.rationale: 临床应用时可加入以全李东垣原义

description_zh: 李东垣所创，用治大头瘟（大头天行）——风热疫毒壅于上焦，发于头面之证。症见恶寒发热、头面红肿焮痛、目不能开、咽喉不利、舌红苔黄、脉浮数有力。清热解毒为主，佐以疏散透邪与升散引经，苦降与升散并用，使热毒得清而不致冰伏。

rhyme.text_zh: 普济消毒蒡芩连，甘桔蓝根勃翘玄。升柴陈薄僵蚕入，大头瘟毒服之痊。
rhyme.gloss_en: Pu Ji Xiao Du has Niu Bang Zi, Huang Qin and Huang Lian; Gan Cao, Jie Geng, Ban Lan Gen, Ma Bo, Lian Qiao and Xuan Shen; add Sheng Ma, Chai Hu, Chen Pi, Bo He and Jiang Can — the big-head epidemic toxin is cured upon taking it.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

description_en: Li Dongyuan's formula for 'great-head pestilence' (da tou wen)—wind-heat epidemic toxin congesting the upper burner and erupting in the head and face. Clearing heat and resolving toxicity is the primary strategy, supplemented by dispersal and upward-guiding to allow heat-toxin to clear without cold-induced entrapment. Contains huang qin, huang lian, ban lan gen, lian qiao, and other clearing and venting herbs.

treatment_principle.en: Clear the nutritive level and resolve toxin; vent heat and nourish yin

composition.explanation_zh: 清营凉血，养阴生津，为君药之一（本方原以犀角为君，现以生地黄与清热药合用代之）
composition.explanation_en: Clears the nutritive level, cools blood, and nourishes yin — serves as sovereign in place of the classical rhino horn.

composition.explanation_zh: 咸寒清热凉血，养阴润燥
composition.explanation_en: Salty and cold; clears heat, cools blood, and nourishes yin.
Nourishes yin, generates fluids, and clears Heart vexation.

composition.explanation_zh: 清热解毒，轻清透达，透热于营分之外
composition.explanation_en: Clears heat and resolves toxin; vents heat out of the nutritive level.

composition.explanation_zh: 清心解毒，与金银花同用透热转气
composition.explanation_en: Clears Heart-heat and resolves toxin; paired with Jin Yin Hua to vent nutritive-level heat back to the qi level.

composition.explanation_zh: 苦寒清心火，直折营分热毒
composition.explanation_en: Bitter and cold; drains Heart fire and cuts the nutritive-level heat toxin.
Clears heat, cools blood, and invigorates blood to disperse stasis.

composition.explanation_zh: 清心凉血，活血散瘀，防营热煎熬成瘀
composition.explanation_en: Clears the Heart, cools blood, and prevents nutritive-level heat from congealing into stasis.

preparation_zh: 水煎服。
preparation_en: Decoct in water and take orally.

modifications.rationale: 吴鞠通原方以犀角为君，另入竹叶心。临床用时仍当按原方加入水牛角30–60g先煎及竹叶心3g，以全其清营透热之功。

description_zh: 《温病条辨》上焦篇治温热病邪初入营分之代表方。主治身热夜甚、神烦少寐、时有谵语、目常喜开或喜闭、口渴或不渴、斑疹隐隐、舌绛而干、脉细数。叶天士所谓「入营犹可透热转气」即此方之法。

rhyme.text_zh: 清营汤治热传营，脉数舌绛辨分明。犀角丹玄连竹叶，银翘麦地共和平。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

description_en: Wu Jutong's formula from the upper-burner chapter of Wen Bing Tiao Bian for warm-heat pathogen initially entering the constructive (ying) level. It treats nocturnal fever exacerbation, spirit vexation with poor sleep, delirious speech, a deep crimson dry tongue, and a fine rapid pulse. Its method embodies Ye Tianshi's principle: 'When the pathogen enters the constructive level, one may still vent the heat and redirect it to the qi level.'

source_chapter: 《外台秘要》卷一引崔氏方（Waitai Miyao, Cui Shi Fang）

treatment_principle.en: Drain fire and resolve toxin

composition.explanation_zh: 大苦大寒，直折心胃之火，为君
composition.explanation_en: Intensely bitter and cold; directly drains Heart and Stomach fire — the sovereign.
Clears upper-burner Lung fire.
Drains lower-burner Kidney and Bladder fire.

composition.explanation_zh: 通泻三焦之火，导热下行从小便出
composition.explanation_en: Drains fire from all three burners and conducts heat downward out through the urine.

preparation_zh: 水煎服。
preparation_en: Decoct in water and take orally.
description_zh: 三焦火毒炽盛之代表方。主治烦躁狂乱、大热、口燥咽干、错语不眠，或热病吐血、衄血、发斑，或身热下利、湿热黄疸；舌红苔黄，脉数有力。方以三黄配栀子，苦寒直折，三焦同治。本方出《外台秘要》引崔氏方。

rhyme.text_zh: 黄连解毒汤四味，黄柏黄芩栀子备。躁狂大热呕不眠，吐衄发斑皆可为。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

description_en: The representative formula for fire-toxin blazing in all three burners, containing huang lian, huang qin, huang bai, and zhi zi. It treats vexation, agitation, great heat, dry throat, epistaxis, hematemesis, macules, and a forceful rapid pulse. The 'three yellows' combined with zhi zi provide bitter-cold direct suppression of fire across all three burners simultaneously.

name_en: Gentian Decoction to Drain the Liver

treatment_principle.zh: 清肝胆实火，泻下焦湿热
treatment_principle.en: Clear Liver–Gallbladder repletion fire; drain damp-heat from the lower burner

composition.explanation_zh: 大苦大寒，上泻肝胆实火，下清下焦湿热，为君
composition.explanation_en: Intensely bitter and cold; drains Liver–Gallbladder fire above and clears damp-heat below — the sovereign.

composition.explanation_zh: 清肝胆湿热，助龙胆草泻火
composition.explanation_en: Clears Liver–Gallbladder damp-heat, assisting Long Dan Cao.
Clears three-burner fire and conducts heat downward.
Percolates dampness and drains heat.

composition.explanation_zh: 清热利水，使湿热从小便出
composition.explanation_en: Clears heat and promotes urination, expelling damp-heat via the urine.

composition.explanation_zh: 凉血滋阴，防苦寒渗利伤阴
composition.explanation_en: Cools blood and nourishes yin, protecting yin from the bitter-cold and draining herbs.

composition.explanation_zh: 养血柔肝，与生地配合防苦燥伤血
composition.explanation_en: Nourishes blood and softens the Liver, paired with Sheng Di to prevent drying injury to the blood.

composition.explanation_zh: 疏畅肝胆气机，并引诸药入肝经
composition.explanation_en: Courses Liver–Gallbladder qi and guides the other herbs into the Liver channel.
Harmonizes the other herbs and moderates their bitter-cold nature.

preparation_zh: 水煎服。
preparation_en: Decoct in water and take orally.

modifications.rationale: 《医方集解》原方另有木通6g，以通利湿热；现代临床因马兜铃酸风险多以通草或川木通代替，临床可酌加通草3–6g。

description_zh: 清肝胆实火、泻肝经湿热之代表方。主治肝胆实火上炎之头痛目赤、胁痛口苦、耳聋耳肿；或肝经湿热下注之阴肿阴痒、筋痿阴汗、小便淋浊、妇女带下；舌红苔黄腻，脉弦数有力。

rhyme.text_zh: 龙胆泻肝栀芩柴，生地车前泽泻偕。木通甘草当归合，肝经湿热力能排。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

description_en: The representative formula for clearing Liver-Gallbladder repletion fire and draining Liver-channel damp-heat. Indicated for Liver fire flaring upward causing headache, red eyes, rib pain, and bitter taste, or Liver-channel damp-heat pouring downward causing genital swelling and itching, turbid painful urination, or leukorrhea. Uses long dan cao as chief with concurrent clearing, draining, and supplementing.

treatment_principle.en: Nourish yin and vent heat

composition.explanation_zh: 辛香透达，引阴分伏热外出，与鳖甲相须为用共为君，取「领之而出」之意
composition.explanation_en: Aromatic and penetrating; vents deep-lying heat out of the yin level — co-sovereign with Bie Jia, which Qing Hao leads outward (「领之而出」).

composition.explanation_zh: 咸寒入阴，滋阴清热，搜剔阴分伏邪，与青蒿相须为君，为「先入」阴分之要药，须打碎先煎
composition.explanation_en: Salty-cool, enters the yin level, enriches yin, clears vacuity-heat and searches out lurking pathogens — co-sovereign with Qing Hao as the deep-sinking half of the classical pair (「先入」into the yin aspect); cracked and decocted first (先煎).

composition.explanation_zh: 甘寒滋阴凉血，滋补真阴，为臣
composition.explanation_en: Sweet and cold; nourishes yin and cools blood, replenishing true yin — the minister.

composition.explanation_zh: 苦寒滋润，助青蒿清透阴分伏热
composition.explanation_en: Bitter, cold, and moistening; assists Qing Hao in clearing and venting yin-level heat.

composition.explanation_zh: 辛寒凉血退虚热，透热外出
composition.explanation_en: Acrid and cold; cools blood, reduces vacuity-heat, and vents heat outward.

preparation_zh: 水煎服。鳖甲打碎先煎十五分钟，再入余药同煎。
preparation_en: Decoct in water and take orally. Crush bie jia (turtle shell) and decoct first for fifteen minutes, then add the remaining herbs and decoct together.
description_zh: 温病后期邪伏阴分之代表方。主治夜热早凉、热退无汗、能食形瘦、舌红少苔、脉细数。吴鞠通自释：「此方有先入后出之妙，青蒿不能直入阴分，有鳖甲领之入也；鳖甲不能独出阳分，赖青蒿领之出也。」

rhyme.text_zh: 青蒿鳖甲知地丹，热自阴来仔细看。夜热早凉无汗出，养阴透热治可安。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

description_en: Wu Jutong's formula for late-stage warm disease with pathogen lurking in the yin level. Indicated for night fever with morning coolness, fever subsiding without sweating, ability to eat despite emaciation, a red tongue with scant coating, and a fine rapid pulse. Wu Jutong himself explained: 'Qing hao cannot enter the yin level alone, but bie jia leads it in; bie jia cannot exit the yang level alone, but qing hao leads it out.'

source_chapter: 辨霍乱病脉证并治 第386条

treatment_principle.en: Warm the middle and dispel cold; augment qi and fortify the Spleen

composition.explanation_zh: 辛热温中阳，祛脾胃寒邪，为君
composition.explanation_en: Acrid and hot; warms middle yang and dispels Spleen–Stomach cold — the sovereign.

composition.explanation_zh: 大补元气，健脾益胃，助干姜复中阳
composition.explanation_en: Greatly tonifies original qi and fortifies the Spleen–Stomach, assisting Gan Jiang to restore middle yang.
Fortifies the Spleen, dries dampness, and assists transformation and transport.

composition.explanation_zh: 甘温益气，调和诸药；用炙甘草
composition.explanation_en: Sweet and warm; augments qi and harmonizes the other herbs (use honey-fried Gan Cao).

preparation_zh: 水煎服。或作丸剂，即理中丸。
preparation_en: Decoct in water and take orally. May also be prepared as pills, known as Li Zhong Wan.
description_zh: 《伤寒论》温中祛寒之代表方。主治脾胃虚寒之脘腹疼痛、喜温喜按、自利不渴、呕吐、食少、畏寒肢冷、舌淡苔白、脉沉细或迟缓；亦治阳虚失血、胸痹虚寒、小儿慢惊、病后喜唾涎沫等。加附子即附子理中汤。

rhyme.text_zh: 理中汤主理中乡，甘草人参术黑姜。呕利腹痛阴寒盛，或加附子总扶阳。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

description_en: The Shang Han Lun representative formula for warming the middle and dispelling cold. Composed of ren shen, bai zhu, gan jiang, and zhi gan cao, it treats Spleen-Stomach vacuity cold with epigastric pain relieved by warmth and pressure, spontaneous diarrhea without thirst, vomiting, poor appetite, cold limbs, a pale tongue with white coating, and a deep, fine or slow pulse. Adding fu zi creates Fu Zi Li Zhong Tang.

source_chapter: 辨太阳病脉证并治中 第102条

treatment_principle.en: Warm the middle and tonify vacuity; harmonize the interior and relieve urgency

composition.explanation_zh: 甘温质润为君，温补脾胃、缓急止痛，为建中之本；烊化服
composition.explanation_en: Sweet, warming and moist — sovereign herb; warms and tonifies the Spleen/Stomach and relieves cramping pain, the foundation of building the middle (dissolved into the warm decoction).

composition.explanation_zh: 酸甘敛阴，柔肝缓急止痛，与饴糖甘缓相合，建中缓急
composition.explanation_en: Sour and sweet, astringes yin and relieves spasmodic pain; combined with maltose to build and harmonize the middle.

composition.explanation_zh: 辛温通阳，温中散寒，与芍药配合一散一收
composition.explanation_en: Acrid and warm; unblocks yang, warms the middle, and disperses cold — paired with Bai Shao as one disperses while the other gathers.
Warms the Stomach and disperses cold, assisting Gui Zhi to warm the middle.

composition.explanation_zh: 甘温补脾，与生姜调和营卫
composition.explanation_en: Sweet and warm; tonifies the Spleen and harmonizes ying and wei with Sheng Jiang.

composition.explanation_zh: 甘温益气，调和诸药；用炙甘草
composition.explanation_en: Sweet and warm; augments qi and harmonizes the other herbs (use honey-fried).

preparation_zh: 上六味，以水七升，煮取三升，去滓，内饴（饴糖），更上微火消解，温服一升，日三服。
preparation_en: Combine all six ingredients, boil in seven sheng of water down to three sheng, strain the dregs, add yi tang (malt sugar), dissolve over low heat, take one sheng warm, three times daily.

modifications.rationale: 《伤寒论》原方以饴糖一升为君，甘温建中。临床用时必须加入饴糖（麦芽糖）30–50g，去滓后烊化温服，方称「小建中」之名。

description_zh: 《伤寒论》虚劳里急之代表方。由桂枝汤倍芍药加饴糖而成，故属桂枝汤衍化方。主治中焦虚寒、肝脾不和之脘腹拘急疼痛、喜温喜按、心悸虚烦、面色无华、四肢酸楚、手足烦热、咽干口燥等虚劳诸证；舌淡苔白，脉细弦。

rhyme.text_zh: 小建中汤君饴糖，桂枝芍药草姜枣。温中补虚和缓急，虚劳里急腹痛良。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

description_en: The Shang Han Lun representative formula for consumptive disease with interior urgency. Derived from Gui Zhi Tang by doubling bai shao and adding yi tang (maltose), it belongs to the Gui Zhi Tang transformation lineage. It treats middle-burner vacuity cold with Liver-Spleen disharmony manifesting as cramping abdominal pain, palpitations, vacuity vexation, sallow complexion, and a fine wiry pulse.

source_chapter: 辨阳明病脉证并治 第243条；辨少阴病脉证并治 第309条；辨厥阴病脉证并治 第378条

treatment_principle.en: Warm the middle and tonify vacuity; direct rebellious qi downward and stop vomiting

composition.explanation_zh: 辛苦大热，温肝胃、散寒降逆，为君
composition.explanation_en: Acrid, bitter, and very hot; warms the Liver and Stomach, disperses cold, and directs rebellious qi downward — the sovereign.

composition.explanation_zh: 重用生姜温胃散寒，降逆止呕，助吴茱萸之力
composition.explanation_en: Large dose of Sheng Jiang warms the Stomach, disperses cold, and descends rebellion — amplifies Wu Zhu Yu.

composition.explanation_zh: 补益脾胃虚气，防辛热伤正
composition.explanation_en: Tonifies Spleen–Stomach vacuity qi and protects the upright qi from the hot-acrid herbs.

composition.explanation_zh: 甘温益气，调和脾胃，和中缓急
composition.explanation_en: Sweet and warm; augments qi, harmonizes Spleen–Stomach, and moderates urgency.

preparation_zh: 上四味，以水七升，煮取二升，去滓，温服七合，日三服。
preparation_en: Combine all four ingredients, boil in seven sheng of water down to two sheng, strain the dregs, take seven ge warm, three times daily.
description_zh: 《伤寒论》温中降逆之代表方，通治阳明胃寒食谷欲呕、少阴吐利手足逆冷烦躁欲死、厥阴干呕吐涎沫头痛四证。主治胃中虚寒、浊阴上逆之呕吐吞酸、胸满脘痛、巅顶头痛、吐涎沫、畏寒肢冷；舌淡苔白滑，脉沉弦或迟。

rhyme.text_zh: 吴茱萸汤人参枣，重用生姜温胃好。阳明寒呕少阴利，厥阴头痛皆能疗。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

description_en: The Shang Han Lun formula for warming the middle and directing counterflow downward. It treats four different presentations across the yang-brightness, lesser yin, and jue yin: Stomach-cold vomiting after eating, vomiting and diarrhea with cold counterflow and vexation, dry retching with drooling and vertex headache, and post-meal vomiting from Stomach-cold. Composed of wu zhu yu, ren shen, sheng jiang, and da zao.

source_chapter: 辨太阳病脉证并治中 第82条；辨少阴病脉证并治 第316条

treatment_principle.en: Warm yang and promote urination

composition.explanation_zh: 大辛大热，温补肾阳，化气行水，为君。用炮附子
composition.explanation_en: Intensely acrid and hot; warms and tonifies Kidney yang and transforms qi to move water — the sovereign (use prepared Fu Zi).
Fortifies the Spleen, percolates dampness, and promotes urination.

composition.explanation_zh: 健脾燥湿，助茯苓化水湿
composition.explanation_en: Fortifies the Spleen and dries dampness, assisting Fu Ling.

composition.explanation_zh: 温散水气，助附子温阳化饮
composition.explanation_en: Warms and disperses water-qi, assisting Fu Zi to warm yang and transform thin fluids.

composition.explanation_zh: 利小便，缓急止腹痛，并制附子辛燥之偏
composition.explanation_en: Promotes urination, relieves abdominal pain, and moderates the acrid-drying nature of Fu Zi.

preparation_zh: 上五味，以水八升，煮取三升，去滓，温服七合，日三服。
preparation_en: Combine all five ingredients, boil in eight sheng of water down to three sheng, strain the dregs, take seven ge warm, three times daily.
description_zh: 《伤寒论》温阳利水之代表方。主治脾肾阳虚、水气内停之小便不利、四肢沉重疼痛、腹痛下利、肢体浮肿、畏寒肢冷；或太阳病发汗太过，汗出不解，其人仍发热、心下悸、头眩身瞤动、振振欲擗地；舌淡胖有齿痕，苔白滑，脉沉细。

rhyme.text_zh: 真武汤壮肾中阳，茯苓术芍附生姜。少阴腹痛有水气，悸眩瞤惕保安康。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

description_en: The Shang Han Lun representative formula for warming yang and promoting urination. Composed of fu zi, bai zhu, fu ling, bai shao, and sheng jiang, it treats Spleen-Kidney yang vacuity with internal water-qi stagnation causing inhibited urination, heavy painful limbs, abdominal pain with diarrhea, edema, cold limbs, and a deep fine pulse; also for excessive diaphoresis causing persistent fever with palpitations, dizziness, and trembling.

source_chapter: 辨厥阴病脉证并治 第351条

treatment_principle.en: Warm the channels and disperse cold; nourish blood and unblock the vessels

composition.explanation_zh: 养血和营，活血通脉，为君
composition.explanation_en: Nourishes blood, harmonizes the nutritive level, and unblocks the vessels — the sovereign.
Warms the channels, disperses cold, and unblocks the blood vessels.

composition.explanation_zh: 养血和营，与当归同补营血
composition.explanation_en: Nourishes blood and harmonizes the nutritive level, paired with Dang Gui to replenish nutritive blood.

composition.explanation_zh: 辛温散寒，通达阳气，助桂枝温散血分寒邪
composition.explanation_en: Acrid and warm; disperses cold and unblocks yang, assisting Gui Zhi to expel cold from the blood level.

composition.explanation_zh: 甘温益气养血，与甘草同补脾气以助生血
composition.explanation_en: Sweet and warm; augments qi and nourishes blood, with Gan Cao tonifying Spleen qi to generate blood.

composition.explanation_zh: 益气补中，调和诸药；用炙甘草
composition.explanation_en: Augments qi, tonifies the middle, and harmonizes the other herbs (use honey-fried).

preparation_zh: 上七味，以水八升，煮取三升，去滓，温服一升，日三服。
preparation_en: Combine all seven ingredients, boil in eight sheng of water down to three sheng, strain the dregs, take one sheng warm, three times daily.

modifications.rationale: 《伤寒论》原方另有通草二两，以通利血脉。临床用时当加通草3–6g，方合原方「通脉」之意。

description_zh: 《伤寒论》厥阴篇温经散寒、养血通脉之代表方。主治血虚受寒、寒凝经脉之手足厥寒、舌淡苔白、脉细欲绝，或兼腰股腿足冷痛、妇女经行腹痛、寒疝等。与四逆汤之回阳救逆不同，本方重在温经养血通脉，故不用姜附而用当归、桂枝、细辛。加吴茱萸、生姜即当归四逆加吴茱萸生姜汤。

rhyme.text_zh: 当归四逆桂芍枣，细辛通草甘草草。血虚寒厥手足冷，温经散寒此方好。

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

description_en: The Shang Han Lun jue yin chapter formula for warming the channels, dispersing cold, and nourishing blood to unblock the vessels. It treats blood vacuity with cold congelation in the channels causing frigid extremities, a pale tongue with white coating, and a fine pulse verging on absence. Unlike Si Ni Tang's yang-rescuing function, this formula emphasizes warming the channels and nourishing blood, using dang gui, gui zhi, and xi xin rather than fu zi and gan jiang.

source_chapter: 济生方 (original attribution: 严用和)

treatment_principle.en: Augment qi and tonify blood; fortify the Spleen and nourish the Heart

composition.explanation_zh: 补中益气，与人参相须以补脾气，为君药
composition.explanation_en: Tonifies the middle and augments qi; paired with Ren Shen to strengthen Spleen qi — the sovereign herb.

composition.explanation_zh: 大补元气，健脾养心，与黄芪共为君
composition.explanation_en: Greatly tonifies original qi, fortifies the Spleen and nourishes the Heart — co-sovereign with Huang Qi.

composition.explanation_zh: 健脾燥湿，助参芪益气补脾
composition.explanation_en: Strengthens the Spleen and dries dampness, reinforcing Ren Shen and Huang Qi.

composition.explanation_zh: 补血养心，与黄芪相伍即当归补血汤意
composition.explanation_en: Tonifies blood and nourishes the Heart; with Huang Qi embodies the Dang Gui Bu Xue Tang pairing.

composition.explanation_zh: 健脾渗湿，宁心安神（茯神更佳）
composition.explanation_en: Strengthens the Spleen, percolates dampness, and quiets the Heart-spirit (Fu Shen is traditionally preferred).

composition.explanation_zh: 养心安神，与龙眼肉相伍补益心血
composition.explanation_en: Nourishes the Heart and quiets the spirit; with Long Yan Rou tonifies Heart blood.

composition.explanation_zh: 补心脾，益气血，养心安神
composition.explanation_en: Tonifies Heart and Spleen, augments qi and blood, quiets the spirit.
Quiets the Heart-spirit and communicates Heart and Kidney.
Moves qi and rouses the Spleen so that tonification does not obstruct.
Harmonizes the Stomach and regulates the middle.

composition.explanation_zh: 益气补中，与生姜调和营卫
composition.explanation_en: Augments qi and tonifies the middle; with Sheng Jiang harmonizes ying and wei.

composition.explanation_zh: 益气和中，调和诸药；用炙甘草
composition.explanation_en: Augments qi, harmonizes the middle and the other herbs (use honey-fried).

preparation_zh: 水煎服，加生姜、大枣同煎。
preparation_en: Decoct in water and take orally, adding fresh ginger and da zao to decoct together.
description_zh: 心脾两虚、气血不足之代表方。由严用和《济生方》首载，后薛己《正体类要》增当归、远志而成今通行方。主治思虑过度、劳伤心脾之心悸怔忡、失眠健忘、体倦食少、崩漏便血等。特点在于气血双补而以补脾为主、补中有行，为脾为气血生化之源、心主血脉学说之临床典范。

rhyme.text_zh: 归脾汤用参术芪，归草茯神远志随。酸枣木香龙眼肉，煎加姜枣益心脾。
rhyme.gloss_en: Gui Pi Tang uses Ren Shen, Bai Zhu and Huang Qi; Dang Gui, Gan Cao, Fu Shen and Yuan Zhi follow. Suan Zao Ren, Mu Xiang and Long Yan Rou — decocted with ginger and jujube to benefit Heart and Spleen.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

description_en: The representative formula for concurrent Heart-Spleen vacuity with qi-blood insufficiency. First recorded by Yan Yonghe; Xue Ji later added dang gui and yuan zhi to form the current standard version. It treats overthinking damaging the Spleen causing palpitations, insomnia, forgetfulness, fatigue, poor appetite, and bleeding from Spleen failing to control blood. It supplements both qi and blood with emphasis on Spleen supplementation.

treatment_principle.en: Augment qi and fortify the Spleen; percolate dampness and stop diarrhea

composition.explanation_zh: 大补元气，健脾养胃，为君
composition.explanation_en: Greatly tonifies original qi and fortifies the Spleen — the sovereign.

composition.explanation_zh: 健脾燥湿，与人参共建中气
composition.explanation_en: Strengthens the Spleen and dries dampness; with Ren Shen rebuilds middle qi.

composition.explanation_zh: 健脾渗湿，与术、参合为四君之意
composition.explanation_en: Strengthens the Spleen and percolates dampness, completing the Four Gentlemen base.
Tonifies the Spleen and Lung and stabilizes the intestines.
Strengthens the Spleen and leaches dampness, reinforcing Fu Ling.
Transforms dampness, rouses the Spleen, and warms the middle.

composition.explanation_zh: 宣肺利气，载药上行，培土生金
composition.explanation_en: Diffuses Lung qi and serves as a guiding courier upward — the earth-generating-metal strategy.

composition.explanation_zh: 调和诸药，益气和中；用炙甘草
composition.explanation_en: Augments qi, harmonizes the middle and the other herbs (use honey-fried).

preparation_zh: 原方为散剂，每服6–9克，枣汤调下；现多作汤剂水煎服。
preparation_en: Originally a powder formula, 6-9g per dose, taken with jujube decoction; in modern practice, mostly prepared as a decoction.
description_zh: 脾虚湿盛泄泻之代表方。以四君子汤为基础，增山药、薏苡仁以健脾渗湿，砂仁行气和中，桔梗载药上行宣肺，体现「培土生金」之治法。主治脾虚夹湿之饮食不化、胸脘痞闷、肠鸣泄泻、四肢乏力、面色萎黄、形体消瘦。

rhyme.text_zh: 参苓白术扁豆陈，山药甘莲砂薏仁。桔梗上浮兼保肺，枣汤调服益脾神。
rhyme.gloss_en: Ginseng, Poria, Bai Zhu, Bian Dou, Chen Pi; Shan Yao, Gan Cao, Lian Zi, Sha Ren, Yi Yi Ren. Jie Geng floats upward to protect the Lung — taken with jujube decoction to benefit the Spleen spirit.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

description_en: The representative formula for Spleen vacuity with dampness preponderance causing diarrhea. Built on Si Jun Zi Tang, it adds shan yao and yi yi ren for Spleen-strengthening dampness percolation, sha ren for qi-moving middle harmonization, and jie geng to carry herbs upward and diffuse the Lung. This embodies the therapeutic method of 'cultivating earth to generate metal.'

treatment_principle.en: Augment qi and enrich yin; unblock yang and restore the pulse

composition.explanation_zh: 益气补中，通经脉、利血气，为君；必用炙甘草
composition.explanation_en: Augments qi and tonifies the middle; unblocks the vessels and regulates blood and qi — the sovereign (must be honey-fried).

composition.explanation_zh: 大补元气，补益心气，助甘草益气复脉
composition.explanation_en: Greatly tonifies original qi and Heart qi, assisting Gan Cao to restore the pulse.

composition.explanation_zh: 滋阴养血，填补营血，与麦冬相须
composition.explanation_en: Enriches yin and nourishes blood, paired with Mai Dong to replenish the ying and blood.
Nourishes yin, moistens the Lung, and quiets Heart vexation.

composition.explanation_zh: 滋阴补血止血，烊化兑服
composition.explanation_en: Enriches yin, tonifies blood, and stops bleeding (dissolved into the decoction).

composition.explanation_zh: 润肠养血，助滋阴养血之功
composition.explanation_en: Moistens the intestines and nourishes blood, reinforcing yin and blood.

composition.explanation_zh: 温通心阳，与炙甘草相伍温阳复脉
composition.explanation_en: Warms and unblocks Heart yang; with honey-fried Gan Cao restores the pulse.
Warms the Stomach and assists Gui Zhi to unblock yang.
Augments qi, tonifies the middle, and engenders fluids.

preparation_zh: 水酒各半煎服。阿胶烊化，兑入药液服。
preparation_en: Decoct with equal parts water and wine and take orally. Melt e jiao (donkey-hide gelatin) separately and blend into the decoction before taking.
description_zh: 《伤寒论》「伤寒脉结代、心动悸，炙甘草汤主之」。又名复脉汤。气虚血少之心悸脉结代证代表方。方中甘草、人参、大枣益气补中，生地、麦冬、阿胶、麻仁滋阴养血，桂枝、生姜、清酒通阳以行血气。气血双补、阴阳并调，为后世温病学「复脉辈」（加减复脉汤、一甲至三甲复脉汤）之祖方。

rhyme.text_zh: 炙甘草汤参桂姜，麦地胶枣麻仁襄。心悸脉结舌光绛，气虚血少保安康。
rhyme.gloss_en: Zhi Gan Cao Tang uses Ren Shen, Gui Zhi and Sheng Jiang; Mai Dong, Sheng Di, E Jiao, Da Zao and Huo Ma Ren assist. For palpitations with a knotted or intermittent pulse and a crimson tongue — qi vacuity and blood scarcity are restored to peace.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

description_en: From the Shang Han Lun passage 'For cold damage with knotted and intermittent pulse and palpitations, Zhi Gan Cao Tang governs.' Also called Fu Mai Tang (Pulse-Restoring Decoction). It treats qi-vacuity blood-insufficiency causing palpitations with bound or intermittent pulse. The formula simultaneously supplements qi and blood while harmonizing yin and yang, and serves as the ancestor of the warm-disease school's 'pulse-restoring' formula lineage.

source_chapter: 内外伤辨惑论 (attributed to 李东垣)

treatment_principle.zh: 益气养阴，生津止渴，敛阴止汗
treatment_principle.en: Augment qi and nourish yin; engender fluids and arrest sweating

composition.explanation_zh: 大补元气，补肺气生津，为君药
composition.explanation_en: Greatly tonifies original qi, tonifies Lung qi and engenders fluids — the sovereign herb.
Nourishes yin, moistens the Lung, and engenders fluids.

composition.explanation_zh: 敛肺止汗，生津止渴，宁心安神
composition.explanation_en: Astringes the Lung, arrests sweating, engenders fluids, and quiets the Heart.

preparation_zh: 水煎服。亦可作散剂或制成生脉注射液（现代制剂）。
preparation_en: Decoct in water and take orally. May also be prepared as a powder or as Sheng Mai Injection (a modern preparation).
description_zh: 气阴两伤之代表方，亦是温热病气阴亏损、暑热伤气耗津之要方。本条目源自李东垣《内外伤辨惑论》。全方仅三味，一补一润一敛：人参补气，麦冬养阴，五味子敛肺。气复则津生，津生则脉复，故名「生脉」。现代常用于冠心病、心功能不全、休克等气阴两虚之证；参麦注射液、生脉注射液即源于此方。

rhyme.text_zh: 生脉麦味与人参，保肺清心治暑淫。气少汗多兼口渴，病危脉绝急煎斟。
rhyme.gloss_en: Sheng Mai Tang: Mai Dong, Wu Wei Zi and Ren Shen — protects the Lung, clears the Heart, and treats summerheat repletion. For scant qi, profuse sweating and thirst — when the pulse is expiring, decoct urgently.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

description_en: The representative formula for concurrent qi and yin damage, composed of only three herbs: ren shen supplements qi, mai dong nourishes yin, and wu wei zi astringes the Lung. When qi recovers, fluids are generated; when fluids are generated, the pulse is restored—hence the name 'Generate the Pulse.' It is the essential formula for summerheat-heat damaging qi and consuming fluids, and modern practice applies it widely in coronary heart disease and heart failure with qi-yin dual vacuity.

name_en: Kidney Qi Pill from the Golden Cabinet

treatment_principle.en: Tonify the Kidney and assist yang; warm and transform water-qi

composition.explanation_zh: 滋阴补肾填精，于阴中求阳，为君
composition.explanation_en: Enriches yin, tonifies Kidney essence — seeking yang within yin (the sovereign).
Tonifies Liver and Kidney and stabilizes essence.
Tonifies Spleen and Kidney and stabilizes essence.

composition.explanation_zh: 温补肾阳，少火生气；炮附子入丸剂
composition.explanation_en: Warms Kidney yang — the 'small fire generating qi' principle (processed Fu Zi in pill form).

composition.explanation_zh: 温通阳气，助附子化气行水；后世多易肉桂
composition.explanation_en: Warms and unblocks yang qi, assisting Fu Zi to transform qi and move water (later traditions substitute Rou Gui).

composition.explanation_zh: 利水渗湿，泻肾浊，制熟地之腻
composition.explanation_en: Drains dampness and Kidney turbidity; tempers the cloying nature of Shu Di Huang.
Strengthens the Spleen and leaches dampness, assisting Ze Xie.

composition.explanation_zh: 清泻肝肾相火，制山茱萸之温涩
composition.explanation_en: Clears Liver-Kidney ministerial fire; tempers Shan Zhu Yu's warm astringency.

preparation_zh: 原方为蜜丸。现代可制水蜜丸或水丸，每次6–9克，每日2次；亦可改作汤剂水煎服（剂量按比例调整）。
preparation_en: Originally prepared as honey pills. In modern practice, may be made into water-honey pills or water pills, 6-9g per dose, twice daily; may also be adapted as a decoction (with proportionally adjusted dosages).
description_zh: 《金匮要略》主治「虚劳腰痛，少腹拘急，小便不利」「男子消渴，小便反多」等八种病证之经典方，又名「八味肾气丸」。取少量桂、附于大剂滋阴药中，意在「益火之源以消阴翳」，为「阴中求阳」之典范。后世六味地黄丸即去此方桂、附而成；济生肾气丸则加牛膝、车前子。主治肾阳不足之腰膝酸软、少腹拘急、小便不利或反多、夜尿频繁、阳痿、痰饮、消渴、脚气、转胞等。

rhyme.text_zh: 金匮肾气治肾虚，熟地淮药及山萸。丹皮苓泽加桂附，引火归元热下趋。
rhyme.gloss_en: Jin Gui Shen Qi treats Kidney vacuity: Shu Di, Shan Yao, Shan Zhu Yu; Mu Dan Pi, Fu Ling, Ze Xie, plus Gui and Fu — leading fire back to its source so heat descends.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

description_en: Zhang Zhongjing's classical formula from the Jin Gui Yao Lue, also called 'Eight-Ingredient Kidney Qi Pill.' It uses small amounts of gui zhi and fu zi within a large yin-nourishing base (Liu Wei Di Huang Wan structure) to 'benefit the source of fire to dispel the shadow of yin,' exemplifying the method of 'seeking yang within yin.' Later Liu Wei Di Huang Wan was derived by removing the warm herbs; Ji Sheng Shen Qi Wan adds niu xi and che qian zi.

treatment_principle.en: Nourish blood and quiet the spirit; clear heat and eliminate vexation

composition.explanation_zh: 养心益肝安神，为君药；宜炒用
composition.explanation_en: Nourishes the Heart and Liver and quiets the spirit — the sovereign herb (use dry-fried).

composition.explanation_zh: 宁心安神，健脾渗湿（原方当为茯神）
composition.explanation_en: Quiets the Heart-spirit (the original text may have specified Fu Shen).
Enriches yin, clears heat, and eliminates vexation.

composition.explanation_zh: 调血疏肝，与酸枣仁相伍，酸收辛散相配
composition.explanation_en: Regulates blood and courses the Liver; pairs sour-astringent Suan Zao Ren with acrid-dispersing movement.
Harmonizes the other herbs and augments the middle.

preparation_zh: 水煎服。酸枣仁宜打碎先煎或久煎。
preparation_en: Decoct in water and take orally. Suan zao ren should be crushed and decocted first or decocted for an extended time.
description_zh: 《金匮要略》「虚劳虚烦不得眠，酸枣仁汤主之」。肝血不足、虚热内扰之失眠证代表方。方中酸枣仁养肝血安神为君，知母滋阴清热为佐制，茯苓宁心，川芎调血疏肝，甘草和中。五味合用，养中有清、补中有行，为后世滋养安神法之典范。主治虚烦不眠、心悸盗汗、头目眩晕、咽干口燥、舌红脉弦细。

rhyme.text_zh: 酸枣仁汤治失眠，川芎知草茯苓煎。虚烦心悸头目眩，养血除烦安睡眠。
rhyme.gloss_en: Suan Zao Ren Tang treats insomnia: Chuan Xiong, Zhi Mu, Gan Cao, Fu Ling — decocted for deficient vexation, palpitations and dizziness; it nourishes blood, dispels vexation and settles sleep.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

description_en: Zhang Zhongjing's formula from the Jin Gui Yao Lue: 'For consumptive vacuity with vexation and inability to sleep, Suan Zao Ren Tang governs.' The representative formula for Liver-blood insufficiency with vacuity-heat disturbing the spirit. Suan zao ren nourishes Liver blood as chief, zhi mu clears vacuity heat, fu ling calms the spirit, chuan xiong regulates blood and courses the Liver, and gan cao harmonizes. It nourishes within clearing and mobilizes within supplementing.

treatment_principle.en: Clear heat and open the orifices; dispel phlegm and resolve toxicity

composition.explanation_zh: 苦寒清心泻火解毒；代替原方牛黄作为君药核心
composition.explanation_en: Bitter-cold, clears Heart fire and resolves toxicity — serving here as the clearing-heat sovereign in place of the omitted Niu Huang.

composition.explanation_zh: 清上焦热毒，助黄连清心火
composition.explanation_en: Clears upper-burner heat toxin and assists Huang Lian to clear Heart fire.
Clears fire in the three burners, drains the Heart, and eliminates vexation.

composition.explanation_zh: 行气解郁，凉血清心，化痰开窍（代麝香通窍之部分作用）
composition.explanation_en: Moves qi, cools blood, clears the Heart, and opens the orifices — partially substituting for the omitted She Xiang.

composition.explanation_zh: 芳香开窍醒神，清热止痛
composition.explanation_en: Aromatic, opens the orifices and revives consciousness; clears heat and relieves pain.

preparation_zh: 原方为蜜丸，金箔为衣，每丸3克，每次1丸，温开水或姜汁化服，每日1–3次；神昏闭证可鼻饲。
preparation_en: Originally prepared as honey pills coated in gold foil, 3g per pill, take one pill at a time dissolved in warm water or ginger juice, one to three times daily; in cases of unconsciousness from blockage patterns, may be administered via nasogastric tube.

add: 羚羊角（保护品，实际以珍珠母或钩藤代替）

description_zh: 温病学「凉开三宝」之首（另二为紫雪丹、至宝丹），出自吴鞠通《温病条辨》。主治温热病邪热内陷心包、痰热蒙蔽清窍之高热烦躁、神昏谵语、舌謇肢厥、中风窍闭、小儿惊厥等。原方共十一味，核心药物为牛黄、麝香、犀角（现以水牛角替代）、朱砂、雄黄、珍珠、黄连、黄芩、栀子、郁金、冰片，并以金箔为衣。其中牛黄、麝香、犀角、朱砂、雄黄属受保护动物来源药或毒性矿物药（野生动物保护/含汞砷重金属），现代临床实际应用必须依照国家药监局批准的中成药安宫牛黄丸成品，本条目不可作为组方依据。

rhyme.text_zh: 安宫牛黄开窍方，芩连栀郁朱雄黄。犀角珍珠冰麝箔，热闭心包功用良。
rhyme.gloss_en: An Gong Niu Huang opens the orifices: Huang Qin, Huang Lian, Zhi Zi, Yu Jin, Zhu Sha, Xiong Huang; Xi Jiao, Zhen Zhu, Bing Pian, She Xiang and gold leaf — for heat closure of the pericardium, its effect is superb.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

description_en: The first of the 'Three Cool-Opening Treasures' in the warm-disease school (the other two being Zi Xue Dan and Zhi Bao Dan), from Wu Jutong's Wen Bing Tiao Bian. It treats warm-heat pathogen invading the Pericardium and phlegm-heat clouding the clear orifices with high fever, spirit clouding, delirious speech, and wind-stroke orifice blockage. Note: This data entry includes only five substitute herbs (huang lian, huang qin, zhi zi, yu jin, bing pian); clinical use requires the officially approved manufactured product.

treatment_principle.en: Clear heat and open the orifices; arrest convulsions and quiet the spirit

composition.explanation_zh: 大寒清气分实热，为君；与知母相伍清热除烦
composition.explanation_en: Greatly cold, clears qi-level repletion heat — the sovereign; with Zhi Mu clears heat and vexation.
Clears heat, drains fire, enriches yin and moistens dryness.
Clears the Heart, drains fire and resolves toxicity.
Clears heat, cools blood, enriches yin and resolves toxicity.
Clears heat, cools blood, nourishes yin and engenders fluids.

composition.explanation_zh: 咸寒泻热通腑，釜底抽薪
composition.explanation_en: Salty-cold, drains heat and unblocks the bowels — 'removing firewood from under the cauldron'.

composition.explanation_zh: 行气开郁，防诸寒凉药凝滞气机
composition.explanation_en: Moves qi and opens stagnation, preventing the cold herbs from congealing qi movement.
Aromatic, opens the orifices, revives the spirit, and arrests convulsions.
Harmonizes the other herbs and resolves toxicity.

preparation_zh: 原方为丹剂，临服研末冷开水调服，每次1.5–3克，每日2次。小儿减量。
preparation_en: Originally prepared as a cinnabar elixir; grind into powder before use and take with cool boiled water, 1.5-3g per dose, twice daily. Reduce dosage for children.
description_zh: 温病学「凉开三宝」之一，清热开窍止痉之要方，最早见于唐《外台秘要》引《苏恭方》，后经《太平惠民和剂局方》整理收载。主治温热病热邪内陷心包、热盛动风之高热烦躁、神昏谵语、痉厥抽搐、斑疹吐衄、口渴唇焦、尿赤便秘。原方共十六味，包含黄金、寒水石、磁石、滑石、朱砂、麝香、犀角、羚羊角、青木香、丁香、升麻、玄参、甘草、芒硝、硝石、石膏。犀角（Rhinoceros horn）为国际一级保护动物制品，麝香亦为严控品；本条目仅供学术参考，临床必须使用国家批准的合法替代成品药。

rhyme.text_zh: 紫雪犀羚朱朴硝，硝黄金寒滑甘膏。丁沉木麝升玄草，热入心包此法超。
rhyme.gloss_en: Zi Xue: Xi Jiao, Ling Yang, Zhu Sha, Mang Xiao, Xiao Shi, gold, Han Shui Shi, Hua Shi, Gan Cao, Shi Gao; Ding Xiang, Chen Xiang, Mu Xiang, She Xiang, Sheng Ma, Xuan Shen, Gan Cao — for heat entering the pericardium, this method excels.

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

description_en: One of the 'Three Cool-Opening Treasures' of the warm-disease school, this formula clears heat, opens the orifices, and stops spasms. It treats warm-heat pathogen sinking into the Pericardium with heat exuberance stirring wind causing high fever, spirit clouding, delirious speech, convulsions, and macules. This data entry retains nine available herbs as a clinical approximation; the complete original formula includes regulated substances and must be used as an officially approved manufactured product.

name_en: Drive Out Stasis from the Mansion of Blood Decoction
source_chapter: 卷上·血府逐瘀汤所治症目

treatment_principle.en: Invigorate the blood, dispel stasis, move qi, and alleviate pain

composition.explanation_en: Breaks and dispels blood stasis — sovereign herb.

composition.explanation_zh: 活血祛瘀，与桃仁相须为用，共为君药
composition.explanation_en: Invigorates blood and dispels stasis; paired with tao ren as co-sovereign.
Cools and invigorates blood, assisting the sovereigns in dispelling stasis.

composition.explanation_zh: 活血行气，为血中之气药
composition.explanation_en: Invigorates blood and moves qi — the qi-mover within blood medicinals.
Invigorates blood, unblocks channels, and directs blood downward.

composition.explanation_zh: 养血活血，祛瘀而不伤血
composition.explanation_en: Nourishes and invigorates blood so that stasis is dispelled without depleting blood.

composition.explanation_zh: 凉血清热，合当归养血润燥
composition.explanation_en: Cools blood and clears heat; with dang gui nourishes blood and moistens dryness.
Courses the Liver and resolves constraint, lifting clear yang.

composition.explanation_zh: 原方用枳壳，此以枳实代之；破气行滞，与柴胡一升一降，调畅气机
composition.explanation_en: Original uses zhi ke (unripe bitter orange peel); zhi shi substituted here. Breaks qi and moves stagnation; paired with chai hu to harmonize ascending and descending qi dynamics.

composition.explanation_zh: 宣肺利气，载药上行，开胸膈之气
composition.explanation_en: Diffuses Lung qi and carries the other herbs upward to open the chest and diaphragm.
Harmonizes the other herbs.

preparation_zh: 水煎服。
preparation_en: Decoct in water and take orally.
description_zh: 王清任《医林改错》名方。治胸中血府血瘀证：胸痛、头痛日久、痛如针刺而有定处，或内热烦闷、心悸失眠、急躁易怒，入暮潮热，唇暗或两目暗黑，舌质暗红或有瘀斑，脉涩或弦紧。本方合桃红四物汤（去熟地用生地，去白芍用赤芍）与四逆散（去芍）再加桔梗、牛膝而成。

rhyme.text_zh: 血府当归生地桃，红花甘草壳赤芍。柴胡芎桔牛膝等，血化下行不作劳。
rhyme.attribution: 方剂学方歌（传统汤头歌诀）

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

description_en: Wang Qingren's celebrated formula from Yi Lin Gai Cuo for blood stasis in the chest (xue fu). It combines Tao Hong Si Wu Tang (substituting sheng di for shu di, chi shao for bai shao) with Si Ni San (minus shao yao) plus jie geng and niu xi. It treats fixed, stabbing chest pain, chronic headache, vexation, insomnia, and a choppy or wiry tight pulse with a dark-red tongue or stasis macules.

treatment_principle.en: Nourish and invigorate blood, warm the channels, and alleviate pain

composition.explanation_zh: 重用以补血活血，化瘀生新，为君药
composition.explanation_en: Used in large dose to tonify and invigorate blood, transform stasis and generate new blood — sovereign herb.

composition.explanation_zh: 活血行气，助当归化瘀生新
composition.explanation_en: Invigorates blood and moves qi, assisting dang gui to transform stasis.
Invigorates blood and dispels stasis.

composition.explanation_zh: 原方用炮姜，此库以干姜代之；温经散寒，入血分而止痛
composition.explanation_en: Original uses pao jiang (blast-fried ginger); gan jiang substituted here. Warms the channels, disperses cold, enters the blood level, and alleviates pain.
Harmonizes the other herbs (use honey-fried).

preparation_zh: 黄酒、童便各半煎服。
preparation_en: Decoct with equal parts rice wine and tong bian (boy's urine) and take orally.
description_zh: 清·傅山《傅青主女科·产后编》治产后恶露不行、小腹冷痛之名方。全方五味，以当归为君重用，养血活血、化瘀生新，故名「生化」。原方用炮姜（炮制过的干姜），其温经散寒之功与干姜相近而力稍峻。

rhyme.text_zh: 生化汤是产后方，归芎桃草酒炮姜。消瘀活血功偏擅，止痛温经效亦彰。
rhyme.attribution: 方剂学方歌（传统汤头歌诀）

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

description_en: Fu Qingzhu's formula from Fu Qing Zhu Nu Ke for postpartum retention of lochia with cold pain in the lower abdomen. Composed of dang gui (as chief in large dose), chuan xiong, tao ren, gan jiang (substituting for pao jiang), and zhi gan cao, it transforms stasis while generating new blood—hence the name 'Generation and Transformation.'

treatment_principle.en: Cool blood and stop bleeding; promote urination and unblock painful urinary dribbling

composition.explanation_zh: 重用凉血止血、养阴清热，为君药
composition.explanation_en: Used in heavy dose to cool blood, stop bleeding, nourish yin, and clear heat — sovereign herb.
Cools blood to stop bleeding, transforms stasis, and promotes urination.
Clears fire of the three burners and directs heat downward via the urine.
Promotes urination, unblocks dribbling, clears heat and drains dampness.

composition.explanation_zh: 养血和血，使凉血止血而不留瘀
composition.explanation_en: Nourishes and harmonizes blood so that cooling and stopping bleeding does not lead to stasis.

composition.explanation_zh: 调和诸药，缓急止痛；炙甘草
composition.explanation_en: Harmonizes the other herbs and moderates urgency (use honey-fried).

preparation_zh: 水煎服。
preparation_en: Decoct in water and take orally.
description_zh: 《济生方》原出，后《医方集解》归入理血之剂。治下焦瘀热蓄于膀胱之热淋、血淋：小便频数，赤涩热痛，尿中带血，舌红脉数。原方尚有小蓟、淡竹叶、木通、藕节四味，合为全方十味，临床使用时当按原方全方投药。

rhyme.text_zh: 小蓟饮子藕蒲黄，木通滑石生地襄。归草黑栀淡竹叶，血淋热结服之康。
rhyme.attribution: 方剂学方歌（传统汤头歌诀）

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

description_en: Originally from Ji Sheng Fang, this formula treats lower-burner stasis-heat accumulating in the Bladder causing heat strangury and blood strangury with frequent, painful, burning, blood-tinged urination. This data entry contains six available herbs (sheng di, pu huang, zhi zi, hua shi, dang gui, gan cao); the complete original formula also includes xiao ji, dan zhu ye, mu tong, and ou jie.

name_en: Mulberry Leaf and Apricot Kernel Decoction

treatment_principle.en: Gently diffuse warm-dryness and moisten the Lung to stop cough

composition.explanation_zh: 清宣肺中温燥之邪，为君药
composition.explanation_en: Gently diffuses warm-dryness from the Lung — sovereign herb.
Diffuses and descends Lung qi, moistens dryness, and stops cough.
Nourishes Lung yin, clears heat, and generates fluids.
Clears heat, transforms phlegm, and moistens the Lung to stop cough.
Clears and drains Lung heat.

preparation_zh: 水二杯，煮取一杯，顿服之；重者再作服。
preparation_en: Boil two cups of water down to one cup and take as a single dose; in severe cases, prepare and take a second dose.
description_zh: 吴鞠通《温病条辨·上焦篇》治外感温燥轻证之代表方。主治身热不甚、口渴、咽干鼻燥、干咳无痰或痰少而粘、舌红苔薄白而干、脉浮数。原方七味：桑叶、杏仁、沙参、浙贝母、栀子、淡豆豉、梨皮，临床用时仍当按原方全方投药。

rhyme.text_zh: 桑杏汤中浙贝宜，沙参栀豉与梨皮。干咳鼻涸又身热，外感温燥服之宜。
rhyme.attribution: 方剂学方歌（传统汤头歌诀）

verification.reviewer: Bencaodian Editorial / 本草典编辑部

description_en: Wu Jutong's formula from the upper-burner chapter of Wen Bing Tiao Bian for mild external warm-dryness. It treats mild fever, thirst, dry nose and throat, dry cough without phlegm or with scant sticky phlegm, a red tongue with thin dry white coating, and a floating rapid pulse. This data entry contains five herbs; the complete formula also includes dan dou chi and li pi (pear peel).

source_chapter: 肺痿肺痈咳嗽上气病脉证治第七

treatment_principle.en: Clear and nourish the Lung and Stomach; direct rebellious qi downward

composition.explanation_zh: 重用以清养肺胃之阴，润燥降逆，为君药
composition.explanation_en: Used in heavy dose to nourish Lung and Stomach yin, moisten dryness, and direct rebellious qi downward — sovereign herb.

composition.explanation_zh: 降逆化痰，与麦冬大量相伍，降逆而不燥，滋润而不腻
composition.explanation_en: Descends counterflow qi and transforms phlegm; paired with a large dose of mai dong so that counterflow is descended without drying and yin is nourished without cloying.
Augments qi and generates fluids.
